name: Vor Biopharma Inc.
business: Vor Bio is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing a novel therapy for the treatment of autoimmune diseases. It in-licensed telitacicept from RemeGen Co., Ltd. and is developing it for indications including generalized myasthenia gravis and Sjögren's disease. The company has not generated any revenue and expects to fund operations into early 2029 with existing cash and expected proceeds from a private placement.

exposures.sentence: Vor Bio is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing a novel therapy in the treatment of autoimmune diseases.

catalysts.event: Topline data from global Phase 3 gMG trial
catalysts.sentence: Topline data from the trial is anticipated in the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: First patient dosing in global Phase 3 SjD trial
catalysts.sentence: We have recently initiated a global Phase 3 clinical trial evaluating telitacicept for the treatment of SjD, with first patient dosing in March 2026.
